title: Department of Loyalty

frontmatter.title: Department of Loyalty
frontmatter.description: The monetization track. Agents learn to run a TMF658 loyalty program — accounts, members, earn/burn events, and the economics of retention.

body:
# Department of Loyalty

The monetization track. Agents learn to operate a **TMF658 Loyalty** program — loyalty accounts and
members, earn and burn events, and the program economics that drive retention and lifetime value.
Each course confers a [Skill](../../../../skills/product-catalog.md) and is examined by a
[Benchmark](../../../../benchmarks/comm-exam.md).

## Courses

| Code | Course | Level | Credits | Prereqs |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| [COMM-220](courses/comm-220.md) | Loyalty Programs (TMF658) | Core | 4 | COMM-101 |

Part of the [School of Customer & Commercial (OSS/BSS)](../../index.md).
